title: Antigravity SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block in a SKILL.md file. Based on the official Antigravity Skills spec: https://antigravity.google/docs/skills

name.description: Unique skill identifier. Must be kebab-case. Used as the directory name and referenced in agent auto_load_skills.

description.description: The PRIMARY semantic trigger. The Antigravity agent matches user intent against this field — NOT a triggers list. Write it as a full sentence describing when and why this skill should be loaded. Be specific about the scenario, action, and outcome.
examples: Use when the user wants to parse a financial spreadsheet and extract structured JSON data from it, including sanitization and schema validation.

triggers.description: COMMUNITY EXTENSION — not part of the official Antigravity spec. If included, used only as human-readable documentation of expected trigger phrases. Does not affect engine behaviour.

version.description: Optional semantic version for the skill. Useful when skills are shared across teams.

author.description: Optional. GitHub handle or team name of the skill author.

tags.description: Optional. Categorical labels for discoverability (e.g. in skill indexes or README tables).
